message:
Fix resource limits detection, security recommendation, GPU sort mutation, oversized files (#4706)

- #4684: Replace placeholder `!p.node` logic in mission suggestions with
  actual CPU/memory limit checks using cpuLimitMillis and memoryLimitBytes
- #4685: Add missing `!currentCardTypes.includes('security_issues')` guard
  so the security card recommendation is skipped when already on dashboard
- #4688: Use spread copy `[...reservationIds].sort()` instead of in-place
  sort to avoid mutating the caller-provided array
- #4681: Lazy-load MissionBrowser (2017 lines) and FlightPlanBlueprint
  (1906 lines) via React.lazy() to reduce initial bundle and improve
  compile performance

Fixes #4681, #4684, #4685, #4688

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
